Information Systems and Technology (English)

MENU

Welcome to the Department of Information Systems and Technologies (English) at Okan University Faculty of Applied Sciences.

We are witnessing a time of rapid transformation in the digital age. Technologies such as globalization, artificial intelligence, big data, cloud computing, and the Internet of Things (IoT) are reshaping every aspect of life. This transformation continues to increase the strategic importance of the IT sector and highlights the growing need for competent professionals.

Our department aims to educate well-equipped individuals who can adapt to these changes, think analytically, and uphold ethical values. As the Department of Information Systems and Technologies (English), our primary goal is to equip you with the qualifications needed not only for today’s demands but also for the challenges of tomorrow. With our academic staff and hands-on educational approach, we look forward to welcoming you, our valued students.
